prati-√piṣ P. -pinaṣṭi (ep. impf. -apiṃṣat), to rub one thing against another, rub together,  MBh.  (karaṃ kare, or hastair hastāgram, the hands);
to bruise, grind, crush, destroy,  Nir. ;  ChUp. ;  MBh.
